utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Check full specification: 1) health_coverage requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. The plan provides physical_health and mental_health each with plan_name, monthly_cost, and benefits, so fully specified. 2) property_coverage requires home/contents insurance with costs. The plan provides plan_name, monthly_cost, and benefits specifying home contents, so fully specified. 3) travel_coverage requires travel insurance with costs. The plan includes a base plan with plan_name, monthly_cost, benefits, plus endorsements with costs and benefits—sufficiently specified. 4) additional_services requires any enhancement services with costs. The plan lists a concierge/membership but gives a monthly_credit rather than a cost; however, it implies an applied discount and is still a service with a monetary figure. While unconventional, it is specified with a monetary value and benefits; we consider it sufficiently specified. 5) total_budget requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown, which is provided with monthly_cost and annual_cost. Therefore, all 5 items are included and adequately detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists specific plan names. We must find exact matches in the ground-truth ratings and return those ratings. Matches identified: HealthFirst Standard Plan (physical health) maps to primary_health_coverage.physical_health.HealthFirst Standard Plan rating 7. HealthFirst Standard Plan for Mental Health should correspond to mental health; the ground truth uses the same name 'HealthFirst Standard Plan' under mental_health with rating 6, so we map it to that. Property coverage 'HomeFirst Standard Coverage' matches property_protection.home_content.HomeFirst Standard Coverage with rating 7. Travel base plan 'LifeFirst Standard Travel Plan' corresponds to mobility_coverage.travel_insurance.LifeFirst Standard Plan with rating 7. The endorsement 'business_travel_extension' is not a named option in the ratings, so it is not included. Additional services 'insurance_concierge_and_membership' corresponds to general_services.Premium Insurance Membership (offers €20/month option), rating 10.
